steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says a monarch “would have been forced to ______ the throne” without the characteristics that confer legitimacy. The blank must mean something like “give up” or “leave” — a verb describing what happens to a ruler who lacks legitimate authority.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'reciprocate': Means to give something in return for something received. Nothing in the sentence involves exchanging or returning anything. ✗
  • Choice B — 'annotate': Means to add notes or commentary. A monarch cannot annotate a throne. ✗
  • Choice C — 'abandon': Means to give up or relinquish. A monarch forced to abandon the throne due to lack of legitimacy fits the context precisely. ✓
  • Choice D — 'equalize': Means to make equal. No meaning relevant to relinquishing power applies here. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
